problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Perovskite crystal structure optimization may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
